scenarios.description: shallowClone() when attributes is null skips attribute‐copying branch and clones minimal state
scenarios.precondition: new Document created with no attributes added
scenarios.expectedResult: returns a new Document with default namespace, baseUri, and cloned outputSettings but without attributes
pseudocode: TEST TC10 shallowClone with null attributes
// no attributes added, so attributes field is null

scenarios.description: shallowClone() when attributes is non-null exercises attribute‐copying branch
scenarios.precondition: new Document with at least one attribute on root
scenarios.expectedResult: returns a new Document whose attributes map equals original's but is a distinct object
pseudocode: TEST TC11 shallowClone with non-null attributes
